## 2025-05-23 - [Critical] JWT Expiration Configuration Bug
**Vulnerability:** JWT expiration policy was being ignored because of a typo in the NestJS JwtModule configuration (using 'sortOptions' instead of 'signOptions').
**Learning:** Typos in configuration objects can silently disable security features without throwing errors, especially when using libraries that don't strictly validate configuration keys.
**Prevention:** Use strictly typed configuration interfaces where possible and verify that tokens generated by the system have the expected 'exp' (expiration) claim using tools like 'jwt.io' or automated integration tests.
